summary: Added two light continuity cues linking the mosque-yard scene back to Nura's lodge discovery in Chapter 10 and forward to her private next-step pressure before Chapter 12, without changing the chapter's public confrontation beats.
edits: Referenced the neighboring char name inside Nura's folder near the chapter opening to tether Chapter 11 more directly to the prior lodge scene.
Surfaced that same penciled char name when Nura opens the folder at the school veranda to seed her Chapter 12 departure motive.
No style-bible example_lines were present verbatim in the chapter text.
